title: Vectors, Matrices, Transformations, and Data Systems
description: Represent flows and transformations across a small service system. Learners cumulatively produce a matrix-based flow and transformation model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use matrix dimensions to validate addition, multiplication, and transformations.
Interpret matrices as transformations of vectors and coordinate systems.
Solve invertible systems and distinguish existence from numerical stability.
